scripts.test:physical: node --test src/immutable-physical-build.test.js src/immutable-physical-server.test.js src/physical-lane-join.test.js src/physical-runtime-profile.test.js src/physical-session-validator.test.js src/route-locks.test.js
scripts.validate:quick: npm run check && npm run test:routes && npm run test:mutations
scripts.validate:full: npm run check && npm run test:routes && npm run validate:v1 && npm run validate:v2 && npm run validate:artifacts
